name: Minty Mousse Pie Au Chocolat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine 4 tablespoons sugar, cornstarch, and mint-chocolate chips. Gradually stir in milk.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
3. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat.
4. Transfer to a large bowl and cover the surface of the chocolate mixture with plastic wrap.
5. Allow to cool to room temperature (20-30 minutes).
6. In a medium bowl, combine heavy cream with the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar; beat until stiff.
7. Remove the plastic wrap from the chocolate mixture and beat well.
8. Fold in the whipped cream.
9. Spoon into the crust.
10. Chill until firm (about 2 to 3 hours).
Use Nestles mint-chocolate chips in this recipe. 2/3 of a 10 oz bag.
Use a prepared 9-inch graham cracker crust in this recipe, or your own favorite cracker crust.
